issues.description: Missing cost condition: 'DON!! −1' indicates a cost requirement (returning 1 DON!! card from field to deck). Should include condition with AttachDon or cost mechanic, not just OnPlay trigger.
Target specification incomplete: 'up to 1' means optional selection. 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' should specify maxCount:1 and isOptional:true to match 'up to 1'.
Second effect with Trigger→PlaySelf is orphaned and incorrect. Card text contains only one effect (conditional KO on play with cost). PlaySelf does not match card text.
